name: I'm in an endless corridor
hints: Almost every direction loops back here. Only one exit leads somewhere different.
Go SOUTH - it is the only direction that leads out of this endless loop.
Go SOUTH to return to the Limbo room (room 33) and try to find the correct exit to live again.
notes: Part of the death/Limbo system. An endless corridor where nearly every exit loops back. Only SOUTH leads to the Limbo room (room 33). Reached from Limbo going NORTH.
